name: joy-diary
description: Joy Diary - 每日三件开心事 · 星座运势 · 中国万年历 · AI 陪聊

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c magenta,cyan "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
